name: starcoin-transfer-workflow
description: Codex plugin that packages a user-in-the-loop Starcoin transfer workflow.

interface.longDescription: Registers the Starcoin node and wallet MCP servers in Codex and adds a transfer skill that keeps prepare, confirm, sign, submit, and watch steps bound together.
defaultPrompt: List Starcoin wallets and chain context for a transfer.
Prepare a Starcoin transfer and wait for my approval.
Track a pending Starcoin transaction by hash.
